name: 預知未來懸念
description: 女主利用前世記憶預知即將發生的災難，觀眾知道她知道但其他角色不知道，形成戲劇性反諷。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: Helen, if you knew that you will lose the use of your legs just for Mave today and maybe even pay the ultimate price, would you regret it?
